stemHtml: A "Visual Approach" can be performed by a flight under IFR…

options.a: if the cloud base is 1000 ft higher than the appropriate DA or MDA for that procedure and the visibility is 5 km or more.
options.b: when either part or all of an instrument approach procedure is not completed and the approach is executed with visual reference to the terrain.
options.c: during IFR and VFR approaches in VMC.
options.d: if the cloud base is 1000 ft higher than the appropriate DA or MDA for that procedure.
